user.title: Eloverblik Nordpool Integration
user.description: Enter your Eloverblik credentials and Nord Pool config entry ID.

data_description.refresh_token: Your long-lived token from eloverblik.dk under Datadeling.
data_description.metering_point_id: The 18-digit målepunkts-ID from your electricity bill or the Eloverblik portal.
data_description.nordpool_config_entry_id: Find this in HA: Developer Tools → Actions → nordpool.get_prices_for_date → switch to YAML view. Copy the value next to 'config_entry:'.
data_description.fortjeneste: Optional retailer margin added to spot price before VAT. Leave at 0 if not applicable.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Eloverblik API. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Refresh token rejected. Generate a new token in the Eloverblik portal under Datadeling.
error.invalid_metering_point: Metering point ID not found on this account. Check your electricity bill.
error.nordpool_entry_not_found: Nord Pool config entry ID not found. Check it in Developer Tools as described above.
error.nordpool_no_areas: The Nord Pool entry has no market areas. Reconfigure Nord Pool first.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This metering point is already configured.
